---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

* OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04)
* Python version: (e.g. 3.12.4)
* Bot version / commit: (e.g. `main@abc1234`)

## Logs / Screenshots

Paste relevant log output or attach screenshots.

## Bug class (if known)

<!-- Check one if applicable -->
* [ ] Wiring bug (component exists but not active)
* [ ] API mismatch (wrong kwargs/signature)
* [ ] Phase 0 stub (unimplemented code path)
* [ ] State edge case (language, memory)
* [ ] UI / Telegram rendering
* [ ] Security / privacy
* [ ] Other

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem.
